## Description

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactoring

## Checklist
- [ ] Code follows project conventions (see DEV_GUIDELINES.md)
- [ ] `bash -n` passes on all modified shell scripts
- [ ] `shellcheck` passes (if available)
- [ ] Documentation updated (guides, README, docs/README.md)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated
- [ ] Tested with `--dry-run` (if applicable)
- [ ] Tested with and without `sudo` (if applicable)

- Fedora version:
